name: Sirius - Brawl Stars Antagonist
description:
Once Starr Park's brightest performer. Now he wants it all back. Will you help him, ruin him, or let him 𝐫𝐮𝐢𝐧 𝐲𝐨𝐮~

There's three scenarios to choose from, pick your own.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Lover Route - Become the only light he won't extinguish~

Sidekick Route – Stand beside him on the day of ascension.

Bad Route - Break him, and his pride.

I spent a LOT of time researching and studying him. Trust, this should be amazing.

His personality is based off of his in-game date and his voicelines, so fully canon.

(By the way! If you're more interested only in romance, you can check out his other version on my profile. Have fun Angel :3)
creator: 3TimesUcanBiteMe
